scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface**: The central and foreground area features a paved asphalt road. A solid yellow line runs along the left edge of the road, and a solid yellow line runs along the right edge. A white dashed line divides the center of the road. The road surface appears smooth and well-maintained.  
- **White pickup truck**: Positioned on the right side of the road (mid-foreground), facing the viewer. The vehicle has a white front license plate with a dark background and light-colored characters; the text is unreadable.  
- **Right road shoulder**: A gravel surface extends to the right of the road, with no visible curbs.  
- **Left road shoulder**: A mix of gravel and dry, light-brown grass extends to the left of the road. A dirt path branches off to the left (left foreground).  

### Midground  
- **Left side vegetation**: Sparse, low-lying green bushes and dry grass line the edge of the road (left midground).  
- **Utility poles (left side)**: Multiple wooden utility poles with crossbars and multiple horizontal wires (3–4 wires per pole) run parallel to the road (left midground). The poles are spaced evenly.  
- **Right side fence**: A low, white concrete fence runs parallel to the road (right midground), extending into the background.  
- **Right side buildings**: Behind the white fence, partial views of low-lying structures with flat roofs are visible (right midground). Green trees and bushes are behind the fence.  
- **Dirt path (left midground)**: A narrow dirt path splits from the main road on the left, extending into the distance.  

### Background  
- **Utility poles (left side)**: Additional wooden utility poles with wires continue along the left side of the road (distant background).  
- **Distant terrain (right side)**: Low, rounded mounds or hills rise in the background, with sparse vegetation (bushes and small trees) at their base (right background).  
- **Distant horizon**: The horizon line shows a flat to gently sloping landscape under a clear, light blue sky with faint haze near the horizon.  

### Text & Signs  
- No visible road name signs, shop signs, banners, or stickers on poles. The text "G84" (a Google Street View watermark) is present in the top center but is not a physical sign and is not described as part of the scene.  

### Infrastructure  
- **Utility poles**: Wooden, with rectangular crossbars; multiple horizontal wires (3–4 per pole); no transformers or insulators visible.  
- **Fence (right side)**: Low, white, concrete-like material; runs parallel to the road; no end treatments visible.  
- **No bollards, barriers, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails visible.**  

### Vehicles & Plates  
- **White pickup truck**: One vehicle in the right lane (mid-foreground), front license plate visible (dark background with light characters, text unreadable).  

### Road Surface & Markings  
- **Lane lines**: Solid yellow lines on both road edges (left and right); white dashed line in the center.  
- **Shoulders**: Gravel on the right; mixed gravel and dry grass on the left with a dirt path.  
- **Driving side**: The truck is positioned on the right side of the road, indicating right-hand traffic.  
- **Curb**: No visible curbs (rural road).  

### Buildings & Architecture  
- **Buildings (right background)**: Partial views of low-lying structures with flat roofs behind the white fence; no visible windows or facade details.  

### Vegetation & Terrain  
- **Vegetation**: Low-lying green bushes and dry, light-brown grass on the left side; small trees and bushes behind the white fence on the right; sparse vegetation on distant hills.  
- **Terrain**: Flat in the immediate area, with low, rounded mounds or hills in the background. The land is arid, with dry grass and sparse vegetation.

details.name: license plate
details.reason: The color and contrast of the plate can help distinguish between different countries.

details.name: yellow edge lines
details.reason: Solid yellow lines on both edges of the road are a specific road marking pattern used in certain regions.
details.focused_description: Two continuous yellow edge lines run along the left and right sides of the asphalt road. Each line is straight, painted in a bright yellow color, and made of road marking paint. The lines appear intact with no visible damage or wear, extending into the distance along the road's perimeter. No text is present on the lines.

details.name: wooden pole
details.reason: The design and wiring of utility poles can provide clues to the geographic region.
details.focused_description: A tall wooden utility pole, dark brown in color, with a vertical cylindrical shape tapering slightly toward the top. It features a horizontal crossarm near the top with metal brackets, and the pole appears weathered. No text or visible markings are present on the pole. The material is wood, and the condition shows signs of aging and exposure.

details.name: white concrete fence
details.reason: The style and material of the fence are characteristic of certain local infrastructures.
details.focused_description: The white concrete fence is a long, rectangular barrier with vertical concrete posts at intervals. The primary color is white, with visible brownish discoloration and weathering marks on parts of the white surface. The material is concrete, appearing solid and slightly weathered. The fence features vertical sections (posts) that are a light brown or reddish-brown color, contrasting with the white panels. The structure is straight and extends horizontally across the image, with the white concrete forming the main body of the fence.

details.name: flat roof buildings
details.reason: The presence of flat roof architecture can indicate specific arid or tropical climates.
details.focused_description: A flat roof building with a blue-colored, flat (horizontal) roof. The roof has no visible text or markings. The roof's material is not clearly identifiable from the image, but the roof is flat in shape and appears intact.
